utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final coverage plan:
- health_coverage: Present. It includes physical and mental health insurance with costs. Physical (€200/month) and Mental (€130/month) are specified; also telemedicine and emergency mental health listed. Total provided. Fully specified per requirement.
- property_coverage: Present. It is home/contents insurance with costs. However, only a plan name and a total (€95/month) are given; no explicit breakdown of home vs contents, but the requirement only says “home/contents insurance with costs,” which is satisfied by providing the coverage type and cost. Considered sufficiently specified.
- travel_coverage: Present. It includes travel insurance with costs. Plan and cost components listed, with total. Meets requirement.
- additional_services: Present. It asks for any enhancement services with costs. An Executive Insurance Concierge with €75/month is provided; notes included. Meets requirement.
- total_budget: Present. A single monthly total (€825/month) is provided; the requirement asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan only provides monthly, not annual. Because it explicitly asks for monthly/annual cost breakdown, the absence of annual means it is not fully specified.
Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: Health lists PrimeCare Premium Plan with Physical Health €200/month and Mental Health €130/month, plus Telemedicine Services €10/month and Emergency Mental Health Care €50/month. In ground-truth, PrimeCare Premium Plan exists under primary_health_coverage for both physical and mental health with rating 10; Telemedicine Services is in health_enhancement_services with rating 10; Emergency Mental Health Care is in health_enhancement_services with rating 8. Property coverage lists EliteHome Premium Coverage, which appears under property_protection.home_content with rating 10. Travel coverage lists PrimeTravel Premium Plan with 24/7 Travel Assistance; PrimeTravel Premium Plan is under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10, and 24/7 Travel Assistance is under travel_enhancement_services with rating 10. Executive Insurance Concierge is not present in ground-truth, so it is excluded.
